message:
fix(ftui-render): reset hyperlink registry to initial state on terminal reset

The reset() method cleared current_link_id to 0 but left the links
Vec containing all previously registered hyperlink URLs. After reset,
stale link IDs from the old session could still resolve via link_url(),
and the registry would grow unbounded across resets.

Now restores links to its initial state: vec![String::new()] (index 0
is the empty-string sentinel matching current_link_id = 0).

Closes #40

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
